title: hieracium longiradiatum
intro: Hieracium longiradiatum, also known as Long-Leaf Hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its long leaves and yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium longiradiatum include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tincture, tea, or salve, allowing for various forms of administration to harness its medicinal properties.
